# For query t (t<n): a[j]=t for j!=t, a[t]=t+1.
# s[j]=p[j]+t for j!=t, s[t]=p[t]+t+1.
# Collision between t and k (k!=t): p[

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    
    nxt = [0] * (n + 1)  # nxt[i] = position of p[i]+1
    prv = [0] * (n + 1)  # prv[i] = position of p[i]-1
    start = -1  # position where p[i] = 1
    end = -1    # position where p[i] = n
    
    # Type 1 queries: a[i] = 1, a[j] = 2 for j != i
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        a = [2] * (n + 1)
        a[i] = 1
        print('?', *a[1:])
        sys.stdout.flush()
        k = int(input())
        if k == 0:
            start = i  # p[i] = 1
        elif k < i:
            # pos(p[i]-1) = k, so prev[i] = k, next[k] = i
            prv[i] = k
            nxt[k] = i
        # else k == i: pos(p[i]-1) > i, will be resolved later
    
    # Type 2 queries: a[i] = 2, a[j] = 1 for j != i
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        a = [1] * (n + 1)
        a[i] = 2
        print('?', *a[1:])
        sys.stdout.flush()
        k = int(input())
        if k == 0:
            end = i  # p[i] = n
        elif k < i:
            # pos(p[i]+1) = k, so next[i] = k, prev[k] = i
            nxt[i] = k
            prv[k] = i
        # else k == i: pos(p[i]+1) > i, will be resolved later
    
    # Reconstruct p
    p = [0] * (n + 1)
    cur = start
    val = 1
    while val <= n:
        p[cur] = val
        if val < n:
            cur = nxt[cur]
        val += 1
    
    print('!', *p[1:])
    sys.stdout.flush()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    
    nxt = [0] * (n + 1)  # nxt[i] = position of p[i]+1
    prv = [0] * (n + 1)  # prv[i] = position of p[i]-1
    start = -1  # position where p[i] = 1
    end = -1    # position where p[i] = n
    
    # Type 1 queries: a[i] = 1, a[j] = 2 for j != i
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        a = [2] * (n + 1)
        a[i] = 1
        print('?', *a[1:])
        sys.stdout.flush()
        k = int(input())
        if k == 0:
            start = i  # p[i] = 1
        elif k < i:
            # pos(p[i]-1) = k, so prev[i] = k, next[k] = i
            prv[i] = k
            nxt[k] = i
        # else k == i: pos(p[i]-1) > i, will be resolved later
    
    # Type 2 queries: a[i] = 2, a[j] = 1 for j != i
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        a = [1] * (n + 1)
        a[i] = 2
        print('?', *a[1:])
        sys.stdout.flush()
        k = int(input())
        if k == 0:
            end = i  # p[i] = n
        elif k < i:
            # pos(p[i]+1) = k, so next[i] = k, prev[k] = i
            nxt[i] = k
            prv[k] = i
        # else k == i: pos(p[i]+1) > i, will be resolved later
    
    # Reconstruct p
    p = [0] * (n + 1)
    cur = start
    val = 1
    while val <= n:
        p[cur] = val
        if val < n:
            cur = nxt[cur]
        val += 1
    
    print('!', *p[1:])
    sys.stdout.flush()

solve()
